query:
SELECT r.id, r.room_number, r.room_type, r.template_id, r.property_id
FROM peppr_rooms r
WHERE r.property_id = '0b866bab-2a18-4bc0-a'
ORDER BY r.room_number;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2C19S8bbifd7Eo1.072c8bfadc68 --database jKkhr27mS3Co8cU4bKqLWb --execute SELECT r.id, r.room_number, r.room_type, r.template_id, r.property_id
FROM peppr_rooms r
WHERE r.property_id = '0b866bab-2a18-4bc0-a'
ORDER BY r.room_number;
